name: A Genuine Offering or A Trick by Wendy Afton?
description:
Something feels wrong about this... Purple woman... But you just can't prove it yet.

[ Drawing used on the PFP made by @H_HappyDn on Twitter. ]

"She's such a bad bitch though! I would fuck the shit out of her man I'm not even kidding-"

This bot contains my headcanons about the FNAF series, because Scott was probably huffin' and puffin' on that faz-goo and the series lore got all funky and goofy.

Please report any issues that you have or find with this bot, as the feedback will help me out by ALOT.

Fuck it. We ball again I guess.

The main inspiration I got for the bot's personality was Dave Miller from Dayshift at Freddy's. I remember seeing a dude playing it on youtube when I was younger and I haven't been able to remove it from my head.

I'm not that much of a FNAF fan but I really like doing these bots. It just feels really good being able to change stuff around it and adding my own little bits of personal theories I had back in the day (which turned out to be wrong a few years later). also probably because of people drawing the main antagonists with big gazonkers.

Since I'm doing a bunch of bots around the game, I might as well make more bots around the game. I guess you guys can leave up suggestions in the comments, but I have a set line of bots I want to do.

Song of the day: The Perfect Girl by Mareux
creator: GrinchUltimatum
